title: nephrodium scabriusculum
intro: Nephrodium scabriusculum, also known as Scabrous Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium scabriusculum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
